title: The $55 million blueprint: How New York’s busiest library swapped worn-out shelves for a civic living room
summary_full: A significant $55 million donation revitalised the Mid-Manhattan Library, transforming it into the Stavros Niarchos Foundation Library. This renovation shifted focus from book storage to community needs, creating dynamic spaces for learning, interaction, and professional development. The redesigned library now serves as a vital, free democratic hub for ordinary New Yorkers.
